programme.title: A Man And A Woman
programme.desc: A Widow and a Widowers' friendship blooms into romance, but can they overcome their tragic pasts. 1966. France. Director: Claude Lelouch. Starring: Anouk Aimee, Jean-Louis Trintignant.

programme.title: Code Unknown
programme.desc: A careless act of littering entangles three strangers, leading to one of them being deported. 2000. France, Germany. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Juliette Binoche, Thierry Neuvic.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: A family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them. 2024. US. Directors: David Zellner, Nathan Zellner. Starring: Jesse Eisenberg.

programme.title: Obvious: AI Art Pioneers
programme.desc: Three French artists break into the art scene without touching a single paint brush, selling art completely generated by AI. 2023. France. Director: Thibaut Seve.

programme.title: Amour
programme.desc: George promises to keep his wife Anne out of hospital after her stroke. 2012. France, Germany. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Jean-Louis Trintignant, Emmanuelle Riva.

programme.title: The Damned
programme.desc: Eva, a 19th-century widow, is plagued by guilt after facing the reality of her choice. 2024. Ireland, United Kingdom. Director: Thordur Palsson. Starring: Odessa Young, Joe Cole.
